title: codereview finding: pseudocode in spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md still mixes Rust type annotations (u8, Option<i16>, RfHealthMetrics) with pseudocode
description: Pure pseudocode should avoid language-specific syntax like Rust's Option and u8. Use generic terms like 'neighbor_count: int', 'rssi: int or null'. Tagged codereview per instructions. Discovered during fix of or-syntax.
